reason: Successfully sent a message to the QA-20260424-025827-iwlj agent and verified it responded with "4" to the math question "What is 2+2?"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully with sidebar visible showing three agents
Located and clicked the "QA-20260424-025827-iwlj" agent in the sidebar — Agent detail page opened and displayed the agent landing page
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status displayed as "idle" in the agent status indicator (top right of agent details)
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field — Message appeared in the textbox with the send button enabled
Clicked the Send button — Message was submitted, agent status changed to "working", and activity indicator showed "Working..." with a timer
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response — Agent responded within 1 second, status returned to "idle"

Verified the response mentions "4" and took a screenshot — Response displayed "4" correctly with "Worked for 1s" timing indicator. Full-page screenshot captured showing user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and agent response "4"
